description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a low boundary wall. The exterior features a mix of smooth gray and white surfaces, with large windows and sliding glass doors providing ample natural light. The front facade includes a prominent garage door, a small set of steps leading to the main entrance, and minimalistic landscaping with palm trees and planters. The rear and side yards are enclosed, offering private outdoor spaces with greenery. The house appears to have an open-plan layout, with visible interior partitions and multiple access points to the outdoor areas. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional spaces, and a contemporary urban aesthetic.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a garage, surrounded by a low wall and landscaped with palm trees. The design features clean lines and a minimalist, urban style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage door, main entrance steps, and landscaped area with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, flat facade, boundary wall, and window placements.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the enclosed backyard, greenery, and additional access points.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible driveway, boundary wall, and side yard landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a small set of steps, a modern door, and minimal landscaping with palm trees and planters.
